title: Richly Crunchy Peruvian Falafel Arroz Con Pato
description: A sweet and crumbly Peruvian dish featuring falafel, pickle, and pescatarian-friendly ingredients in the form of arroz con pato, this recipe is a show-off dish that combines flavors and textures in a unique way, it is a pescatarian friendly meal.
instructions: Cook the white rice according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the duck fat over medium heat and cook the falafel until golden brown.
Add the chopped scallions, crushed plantain chips, and aji amarillo pepper to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the falafel mixture.
Add the pickle slices and shrimp broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with additional chopped scallions and pickle slices if desired.
